patches_modified.name: Bypass Samsung Account provider checks
patches_modified.description: Replaces com.osp.app.signin with com.notsamsung.dummy in dex and routes account lookups through Android AccountManager instead of Samsung Account's provider.

patches_modified.name: Disable Knox integrity checks
patches_modified.description: Bypass Knox, root, warranty bit, and SAK checks so Samsung Health runs on Knox-tripped devices (0x1) without root.
